# hrobot_meta (Data Source)

Returns metadata about the hetzner-robot provider. Scaffolding data source used to validate provider wiring; superseded by real Hetzner Robot data sources (hrobot_server and the declarative resources) in later versions.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hrobot_meta" "current" {}

output "provider_version" {
  value = data.hrobot_meta.current.version
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `note` (String) Optional note echoed back unchanged in the response.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Static identifier for this metadata lookup.
- `version` (String) The running provider version.
